name: digital-marketing-pro
description: End-to-end digital marketing engagement methodology for Claude Code & Cowork. **v3.4.1** is an audit + corrections pass on v3.4.0: C2PA script rewritten against the real c2pa-python 0.32 API and end-to-end tested (Builder + Signer.from_info + proper certificate extensions); ads MCP entries corrected to verified endpoints (Synter Media AI 7 platforms at mcp.syntermedia.ai, Ryze AI Google-Ads managed-OAuth at get-ryze.ai, Northbeam community-maintained at github.com/mattcoatsworth/Northbeam-MCP-Server); parallel-dispatch speedup claims softened from flat 6× to honest 4–6× parallelism with ~50–80% wall-clock reduction; unverified submission URL removed. v3.4 added: (1) C2PA content-provenance skill + script for EU AI Act Article 50 compliance, (2) unified ads-platform MCPs in the connectors catalog, (3) explicit parallel subagent dispatch in engagement-workflow + 4 multi-dimensional commands, (4) Anthropic Software Directory submission packet at SUBMISSION.md. v3.3 modernized May 2026 reality across privacy/compliance, channel mechanics, and AEO/GEO. 12-Part Strategy Flow producing the Four Core Documents (61 explicit steps), Two-Views Model, Decision Matrix, Update-Back Rule, Living Project Instruction File. 25 specialist agents, 150 skills, 71 Python scripts, 10 top-level commands, 14 HTTP MCP connectors, 16 industry profiles, 16 privacy-law jurisdictions.
